== Notes for [[Item:Q87666|Q87666]] ==

ID: I21149

Name: Thermantia

Given Name: Thermantia

Sex: F

_UID: F3D7FF26AD49D811BE490080C8C142CCEC13

Change Date: 26 Nov 2005

Birth: ABT 325

Death: deceased

Marriage 1 Flavius Theodosius of Rome b: 325 in Caus Castle, Salop

Married:

Children

Theodosius I of Rome b: 11 JAN 346/47 in Cauca, Gallaccia, Spain

Forrás / Source:

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=jdp-fam&id=I21149
--------------------
Reference: http://familytrees.genopro.com/318186/jarleslekt/default.htm?page=toc_families.htm
--------------------
Reference: http://familytrees.genopro.com/318186/jarleslekt/default.htm?page=toc_families.htm
--------------------
•ID: I043880

•Name: THERMANTIA I DE ROME OR (L) PULCHERIA

•Sex: F

•ALIA: (L) /Thermantia/

•Name: AKA Thermantia (L) de Rome 1

•Birth: BET 324 AND 332 1

•Death: 386

•Event: 1 AKA THRMANTIA THE ELDER OF THE (L) HOLY ROMAN EMPIRE

Marriage 1 FLAVIUS (NOTES) THODOSIUS COUNT (L) COCO-SEGOVIA b: BET 316 AND 330 in Caus Castle, Salop

Children

1. HONORIUS OF (L) ROMAN EMPIRE b: ABT 340

2. THEODOSIUS I (L) DE CAUCA b: BET 11 JAN 347 AND 11 JAN 357 in Cauca, Gallaccia, Spain

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=pusch&id=I043880

RESEARCH NOTES:
"the elder"

_P_CCINFO 2-2438

"THE ELDER"

SOURCE NOTES:
http://homepages.rootsweb.com/~cousin/html/p172.htm#i10688

-- MERGED NOTE ------------

Wikidata: https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q56305768 | Geni: https://www.geni.com/people/6000000005230548929

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
